verdict.rationale: The claim's 13.053m matches the regional scorecard's 'Qualified commercial pipeline' (local CRM), but the Q2 2026 Finance Pack v2 — the final restatement approved 15 July 2026 — reports 'Qualified pipeline' at 13.510m for the same period; the regional document explicitly states it 'is not ranked against Finance,' so no authority ordering resolves the conflict.
verdict.suggested_action: Determine whether the master document intended the regional CRM-qualified pipeline (13.053m) or the Finance group pipeline (13.510m), and align the figure to the chosen source.
